release_groups.notes: Standard versus ruleset and evergreen mechanics needed for the playable local-match milestone.
Later set mechanics intentionally deferred until the evergreen engine and trigger system are stable.
Story, Arena, Chaos, and lane-rule content that should remain additive over the core versus engine.
Synthetic rules objects such as Out of Cards or other non-collection records created by engine logic.

set_record_contract.notes: Actual historical set population is deferred until card import begins; this contract keeps set_id usage stable in card records now.
